'''Tooth''' was a native [[Molavaran]] leading a convoy of settlers on [[Molavar/Legends|Molavar]]. Upon arriving on Molavar, former mercenary [[Darca Nyl]] journeyed with Tooth's convoy for some time. Later, Darca called upon Tooth's people to help a local homesteader, [[Byrom]], from a criminal gang led by [[Magon]]. They were successful and Tooth and his convoy settled down near Byrom's land to start a new life.
